calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor of a minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Jian Xiang Zhao and Zhong Xi Wu were present in pro per as Guardians ad Litem for the minorKai Hua Zhao.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Sophia Lin was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.
service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Kyle Kai Hua Zhao.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
